node.html:
• Appointed as Teaching Assistant for undergraduate Physics courses beginning January 2026.
  • Responsibilities include supporting labs/tutorials, assisting and grading with assessments, and providing student academic support.

• Developed a skin cancer image segmentation framework using multilevel thresholding techniques.
  • Implemented Kapur's entropy and Otsu's method optimized using advanced meta-heuristic algorithms (EMO, AHO, AHA, etc.).
  • Benchmarked optimization performance across CEC2014, CEC2017, CEC2020, and CEC2022 test suites with statistical validation using Friedman tests.
  • Evaluated segmentation quality using PSNR and fitness convergence to identify the most effective optimizer.
  • Conducted research under the supervision of Dr. Mohamed Tawhid, focusing on optimizer selection for medical image analysis.

• Co-founded and developed a web platform providing digital presence solutions for 8 Canadian local businesses.
  • Delivered full-stack applications with a focus on usability and performance.

• Executed 200+ functional, regression & performance test cases per release, driving a 98% defect-closure rate.
  • Built Python anomaly-detection scripts for Kafka streams & MongoDB logs, reducing manual debug time by 85%.
  • Managed Dockerized microservices in Jenkins pipelines; improved deployment reliability and rollback speed.
  • Collaborated with cross-functional teams in Jira-driven sprints, cutting mean time-to-resolution by 40%.

• Developed Spring Boot + SQL search dashboard, lowering query latency by 20%.
  • Created REST APIs & dynamic JS front-end components adopted by 20+ internal users.
  • Optimized caching & indexing, boosting back-end response times by 25%.

• Trained BERT & LSTM sentiment models on 100k+ reviews, raising F1-score to 0.90.
  • Designed Tableau & React dashboards transforming insights into product decisions.
  • Led EDA & A/B experiments improving model accuracy by 20%.
